services.title: Cross Platform with WebGL
services.description: The right way to build apps — with immediate and long-term savings on development and maintenance costs. Develop for all platforms with a single codebase: Android, iPhone, all browser types, SmartTV, social networks, and more.

services.title: Powerful 3D User Experience
services.description: Games and 3D apps are a powerful draw for users. More than any regular web page or app, 3D creates an immersive user experience and strong interaction that keeps users coming back.

services.title: One Vision
services.description: OneCode offers full business development support to get the most out of your app investment — including business plan preparation, investor presentations, app specification, and planning and execution of marketing campaigns.

specializations.title: WebGL
specializations.description: WebGL is a JavaScript API that enables the development of apps with complex and 3D graphics on the web without installing a plug-in. WebGL now brings to browsers what was once exclusive to gaming consoles. You can develop an advanced 3D app in a single codebase that runs on desktop browsers, mobile, and smart TVs.

specializations.title: HTML5
specializations.description: HTML5 is establishing itself as the standard central code for web applications — and even for applications outside the web. The latest iteration of the HTML language allows us to create rich and advanced environments that run on every platform.

portfolioCategories.title: 3D Apps
portfolioCategories.description: Apps that incorporate 3D are today the most powerful tool for capturing user attention over time, and an excellent means for visualizing products and creating advanced learning environments.

portfolioCategories.title: Cross Platform Development
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development is the best way to provide users with a consistent experience on mobile, desktop, and everywhere else.

portfolioCategories.title: Mobile Apps
portfolioCategories.description: Cross-platform development is the best way to provide users with a consistent experience on mobile, desktop, and everywhere else.

portfolioCategories.title: Game Development
portfolioCategories.description: Games are powerful tools for marketing, messaging, and generating revenue. But not every game! OneCode knows what it takes to put the right elements into your game.

portfolioCategories.description: Games are powerful tools for marketing, messaging, and generating revenue. But not every game! OneCode knows what it takes to put the right elements into your game.

blogPosts.title: Keren Brown-Tsamir on Innovation and Creativity in the Startup World: How Crises and Military Reserve Duty Spark Invention
blogPosts.excerpt: In an era of constant change, startups find themselves in a never-ending race to reinvent themselves. The competitive business reality demands creative thinking. Ironically, extended military reserve service — often viewed as a burden — can be fertile ground for developing creative thinking and driving innovation and entrepreneurship.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: Keren Brown-Tsamir in an Israel Hayom Interview: "Work Smarter, Not Harder"
blogPosts.excerpt: The AI revolution and new trends in the world of work are creating dramatic changes. Attorney Keren Brown-Tsamir, who mentors startups in their founding and growth stages and helps employers recruit and motivate employees in a smart and flexible way adapted to changing times: "You need to see the artificial intelligence revolution as an opportunity, not a threat, and get to know the advanced tools that significantly improve the way we work."
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: A Multidimensional Challenge: Fitting 3D Into a Web Page?
blogPosts.excerpt: An article by Ronen Tsamir, CTO of OneCode, on Point Cloud and the Potree library for displaying large-scale 3D on web pages.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: The Entrepreneur's Holy Grail (MVP) and How to Reach It
blogPosts.excerpt: An article by Keren Brown-Tsamir, founder and CEO of OneCode, on the critical importance of MVP along with several key tips for managing it effectively.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE
blogPosts.imageCredit: Photo credit: Whit Preston, Getty Images Israel

blogPosts.title: "A great idea, no matter how good, and even a solid execution of it, aren't always enough. A good advisor or the right partner can make all the difference for a venture's success" — Keren Zavit with Keren Brown-Tsamir
blogPosts.excerpt: Keren Brown-Tsamir is the founder and CEO of OneCode, a software house specializing in app development and 3D. An economist and attorney with an LLM from Bar-Ilan University, she is involved with numerous startups as an advisor and mentor — from the idea stage and proof of concept (POC) all the way through development — with the actual development carried out by her software house, OneCode.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: From Flash to HTML5 – How to Do It Right?
blogPosts.excerpt: Ronen Tsamir, CTO, presents in a guest article written for Passover how to migrate from Flash apps to HTML5 without spending 40 years in the desert. Is it really time to make the switch, and how can you shorten the journey?
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: Interview with Keren Tzamir Brown – A mentor for startups, an entrepreneur, and an activist for women in the Hi-Tech industry
blogPosts.excerpt: Keren Brown Tsamir is a lawyer and economist specializing in accompanying start-ups in their preliminary stages. She helps entrepreneurs to change their thinking regarding employee management in the hybrid age, including recruiting, retaining, and managing employees in Israel, and opening…
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: From Founding Startups to Founding Her Own — to Advancing Women in Tech: Meet Keren Brown-Tsamir
blogPosts.excerpt: Keren Brown-Tsamir is an economist and attorney who mentors startups in their early founding and growth stages. She helps them rethink workforce management in the hybrid era, including recruiting, retaining, and managing employees in Israel, and establishing development centers abroad. She is currently also leading a new startup she founded in the field of 3D real estate and the integration of real-world real estate in the metaverse. A special interview.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: Keren Brown-Tsamir in TheMarker's Special Issue on Powerful Women of 2021
blogPosts.excerpt:
Navigating the New World of Startups
Attorney Keren Brown-Tsamir, who mentors startups in their early stages and builds combined teams in Israel and around the world, shares insights on shifts in the hi-tech employment landscape. As someone who transformed her own work style in the wake of COVID-19, she urges employers to recognize that the world of work has changed and to embrace hybrid and remote work arrangements, along with the necessary management adjustments.
blogPosts.author: ONECODE

blogPosts.title: The Human in the App Wins – Lessons from Designing an Education App

projects.title: Promotional Mini-Game for the PAZAM App
projects.description: Development of a marketing mini-game as part of a product promotion in the PAZAM soldiers' app. The game is based on OneCode's game engine, which enables rapid development for advertising, marketing, and branding purposes.

projects.title: Game Engine for Word Puzzle App
projects.description: An engine for creating word games. The player must find the correct word within a time limit by dragging letters into the correct positions.

projects.title: KKL Quiz App 2018 – Zionism, People, and Environment
projects.description: Development of a quiz game app on the themes of Zionism, people, and the environment. The app is designed to help users prepare for the KKL quiz and the school exam.

projects.title: TAP Engine Development
projects.description: Development of a TAP engine for game apps — allowing various items to move in a given direction while the player's goal is to prevent them from reaching their destination.

projects.title: Running Monkey Game Development
projects.description: A RUNNER game engine that allows collecting falling items, accumulating points, and dodging obstacles.

projects.title: Obstacle Airplane Mini-Game – in the PAZAM App
projects.description: Development of a mini-game for the PAZAM soldiers' app. Participants accumulate points, enter weekly rankings, and win prizes.

projects.title: Unity Game Development: Don't Wake Papa
projects.description: Don't Wake Papa — development of a Unity-based game app for Android and iOS. The game challenges the player's reaction speed.

projects.title: Three Games for Baby TV
projects.description: Development of three games for the Baby TV channel.

projects.title: Rolling Out – Mini-Game in the PAZAM App
projects.description: Rolling Out — a mini-game in the PAZAM mobile app. Players can accumulate points and win various prizes tailored for soldiers.

projects.title: Real-Time 3D Virtual Exhibition Development for Medium
projects.description: A 3D virtual exhibition — the first of its kind to run in any browser on any device with high performance, no plug-in installation required.

projects.title: The Maze – Strategy Game
projects.description: Development of a maze-building and exploration game in WebGL. Cross-platform with fast load times.

projects.title: Don't Wake Papa Mobile Game Development
projects.description: A new game combining timing skills, quick reaction, focus, and competition. The goal is to not wake up Papa.

projects.title: Tridshops – 3D Social Shopping Platform Development
projects.description: A platform for creating and managing a 3D virtual store where consumers can browse in real time, just like a physical store.

projects.title: Flash to HTML5 App Conversion – KKL Quiz
projects.description: Conversion of a KKL Flash app to HTML5 on the topic of geography knowledge of Israel. The migration delivered a better user experience and greater compatibility.

projects.title: VIVA DIAMONDS – Game Development
projects.description: Game development for Playfriend777, combining a word challenge with coordination skills to create a unique gameplay style.

projects.title: EduMetrix Virtual Learning Environment Development
projects.description: A virtual world containing dozens of learning objects, some incorporating OneCode's proprietary 3D technology.

teamMembers.name: Keren Brown-Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: With the broad perspective of a CEO, the attention to detail of an attorney, and the multitasking skills of a mother of two — she leads the OneCode OneVision vision that has guided the company since its founding.

teamMembers.name: Ronen "Ranger" Tsamir
teamMembers.bio: Armed with a wide-angle view and a long-range scope, and after conducting a full terrain survey and choosing the tools that fit the project and business needs precisely — he guides projects safely to their destination.
